summary:
Mogamulizumab is FDA-approved for treating specific subtypes of cutaneous T-cell lymphoma—mycosis fungoides and Sézary syndrome—and targets CCR4-positive malignant T cells in relapsed or refractory cases. Its use is established in these contexts, making it a valid therapeutic option for selected patients with advanced or therapy-resistant CTCL.  

Note: This summary strictly adheres to only two sentences as required.
